description_long: This coupe car features a sleek, elongated body with a deep burgundy finish and a classic two-door design. The roofline is gently sloped, giving it a refined notchback profile, while the windows are large and slightly tinted, providing good visibility. The wheels are multi-spoke alloys, and the tires are low-profile, enhancing the sporty appearance. The front end is equipped with a set of round headlights and a subtle grille, while the rear displays rectangular taillights and a visible license plate. The side mirrors are compact and streamlined, and the door handles are flush with the body. The interior, visible through the windows, appears to have two rows of seats and a standard dashboard layout.
description: A sleek, burgundy two-door coupe car with a notchback roofline, alloy wheels, and a sporty, classic design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated body, two doors, and alloy wheels.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the rectangular taillights, license plate, and rear window.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the two-door coupe profile and alloy wheels.
description_view_3: Front view displaying round headlights, subtle grille, and compact side mirrors.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
